entries.source: data interpretation AI
entries.value: AI ya kutafsiri data

entries.source: Data Interpreter
entries.value: Mfasiri wa Data

entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Data Interpreter ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: bandika data, maelezo ya chati, au matokeo na ujifunze yanamaanisha nini, hayamaanishi nini, na ni nini cha kuuliza baadaye.

entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Data Interpreter: mwongozo wa vitendo

entries.source: Data Interpreter prompts and study loop
entries.value: Vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Data Interpreter

entries.source: Dates and summaries matter, but learners often need a way into the human situation: what people believed, what choices they saw, what limits shaped them, and what they could not have known.
entries.value: Tarehe na muhtasari ni muhimu, lakini wanafunzi mara nyingi huhitaji njia ya kuingia katika hali ya kibinadamu: watu waliamini nini, waliona chaguo zipi, mipaka gani iliwaathiri, na mambo gani hawangeweza kuyajua.

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Bishana kuhusu mada yoyote, changamoto, linganisha madai, na jifunze jinsi ya kutoa hoja zenye nguvu zaidi.

entries.source: Debate helps you separate claims, evidence, values, and assumptions, which makes historical interpretation more precise.
entries.value: Mjadala hukusaidia kutenganisha madai, ushahidi, maadili, na dhana, jambo linalofanya tafsiri ya kihistoria iwe sahihi zaidi.

entries.source: Debate justice with Batman
entries.value: Bishana kuhusu haki na Batman

entries.source: Debate modes that help learners make claims, face counterarguments, and improve reasoning under pressure.
entries.value: Hali za mjadala zinazowasaidia wanafunzi kutoa madai, kukutana na hoja za kupinga, na kuboresha mantiki chini ya shinikizo.

entries.source: Debate the claim
entries.value: Jadili hoja hiyo

entries.source: Debate the claim from more than one side so you can notice assumptions, tradeoffs, and weak evidence.
entries.value: Jadili hoja kutoka zaidi ya upande mmoja ili uweze kutambua dhana, mambo ya kuzingatia, na ushahidi dhaifu.

entries.source: Debate this historical or philosophical claim from both sides. Separate evidence, assumptions, and values.
entries.value: Jadili hoja hii ya kihistoria au kifalsafa kutoka pande zote mbili. Tenganisha ushahidi, dhana, na maadili.

entries.source: Debate through a chosen voice
entries.value: Bishana kupitia sauti uliyochagua

entries.value: Bishana na mtu mashuhuri

entries.source: Debate with a personality prompts and study loop
entries.value: Vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Debate with a personality

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI
entries.value: Jadili na Haiba kwa Kutumia AI

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Jadili na Haiba kwa Kutumia AI ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: taja haiba halisi au ya kubuni na jadiliana nayo kuhusu mada yoyote. AI huiga mtindo wao wa umma na mtazamo wao wa dunia huku ikiweka mjadala kuwa wa haki.

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI: practical guide

entries.value: Fafanua sheria, hatua muhimu, vituo vya marudio, na hatua za kurejea baada ya kukwama.

entries.source: Define terms, test examples, compare views, and invite the learner's position.
entries.value: Fafanua istilahi, jaribu mifano, linganisha mitazamo, na mwalike mwanafunzi atoe msimamo wake.

entries.source: Define the deadline and scope
entries.value: Fafanua makataa na wigo

entries.value: Bainisha lengo

entries.source: Define, show examples, ask the learner to use words, and review missed items.
entries.value: Fafanua, onyesha mifano, mwombe mwanafunzi atumie maneno, na rudia vipengee vilivyokosekana.

entries.source: Definitions
entries.value: Fasili

entries.source: Delete cards that are too broad or obvious.
entries.value: Futa kadi zilizo pana sana au dhahiri sana.

entries.value: Elezea au bandika maelezo kutoka kwa picha na upate usaidizi wa kusoma michoro, chati, matatizo, madokezo yaliyoandikwa kwa mkono, au ushahidi wa kuona.

entries.value: Elezea picha au bandika kile kinachoonekana

entries.value: Sanifu mfumo wa pointi, viwango, jitihada, na zawadi kulingana na maendeleo halisi ya kujifunza.

entries.source: Design a revision sprint
entries.value: Buni mbio za marudio

entries.source: Design a tiny daily review
entries.value: Buni mapitio madogo ya kila siku

entries.source: Design cues, reduce friction, track attempts, and recover from misses.
entries.value: Buni ishara, punguza msuguano, fuatilia majaribio, na pona kutokana na makosa.

entries.source: Design leaderboards that motivate without distorting learning.
entries.value: Buni mbao za alama zinazohamasisha bila kupotosha kujifunza.

entries.source: Design levels for coding practice
entries.value: Sanifu viwango kwa ajili ya mazoezi ya uandishi wa programu

entries.source: Design meaningful achievement systems for learning.
entries.value: Buni mifumo ya mafanikio yenye maana kwa kujifunza.

entries.source: Designed for confidence
entries.value: Imeundwa kwa ajili ya kujiamini

entries.source: Diagnose and repair misconceptions.
entries.value: Tambua na rekebisha dhana potofu.

entries.source: Diagnose, suggest revisions, invite learner choice, and iterate.
entries.value: Tambua tatizo, pendekeza marekebisho, mwalike mwanafunzi achague, na rudia.

entries.source: diagram labeling
entries.value: uwekaji lebo kwenye mchoro

entries.source: Diagram Labeling Practice
entries.value: Mazoezi ya Kuweka Lebo kwenye Michoro

entries.source: Did the AI check your reasoning instead of simply replacing it?
entries.value: Je, AI ilikagua mantiki yako badala ya kuibadilisha tu?

entries.source: Did you answer at least one question before reading the correction?
entries.value: Je, ulijibu angalau swali moja kabla ya kusoma marekebisho?

entries.source: Different jobs need different modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and more.
entries.value: Kazi tofauti zinahitaji hali tofauti: maswali ya Kisokrati, vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, flashcards, mjadala, uigizaji wa historia, ukosoaji wa uandishi, na zaidi.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: Kazi tofauti za kujifunza zinahitaji mitiririko tofauti. Tumia kocha wa kazi za nyumbani kwa vidokezo, kocha wa hatua za hisabati kwa kutatua matatizo, mkufunzi wa Kisokrati kwa uelewa wa kina, flashcards kwa kukumbuka, na maswali kwa mazoezi yaliyopimwa kwa shinikizo.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Kazi tofauti za kujifunza zinahitaji miundo tofauti ya mwingiliano, kwa hiyo inspir hutumia ufundishaji hai na maalum kwa kila hali. Kidokezo cha kazi za nyumbani, swali la Kisokrati, uigaji wa kihistoria, marudio ya flashcard, na ukosoaji wa uandishi havipaswi kutenda kama gumzo lilelile la jumla.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.
entries.value: Kazi tofauti za kujifunza zinahitaji maumbo tofauti: maswali ya Kisokrati, vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, flashcards, mjadala, uigizaji wa historia, ukosoaji wa uandishi, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: Different people need different AI learning routes.
entries.value: Watu tofauti wanahitaji njia tofauti za kujifunza kwa AI.

entries.source: Disallowed
entries.value: Hairuhusiwi

entries.source: Disclaimer Of Warranty
entries.value: Kanusho la Dhamana

entries.source: Disclosure of Data
entries.value: Ufichuzi wa Data

entries.source: Discover paths that fit you
entries.value: Gundua njia zinazokufaa

entries.source: Discover paths that fit you.
entries.value: Gundua njia zinazokufaa.

entries.source: Discovery
entries.value: Ugunduzi

entries.source: Discovery is open where the content is public.
entries.value: Ugunduzi uko wazi pale maudhui ni ya umma.

entries.source: Dismiss language options
entries.value: Funga chaguo za lugha

entries.source: Distribution that started offline
entries.value: Usambazaji ulioanzia nje ya mtandao

entries.source: Diverge, cluster, choose, refine, and make the idea actionable.
entries.value: Panua, panga katika makundi, chagua, boresha, na fanya wazo litekelezeke.

entries.source: DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims
entries.value: Notisi na Utaratibu wa DMCA kwa Madai ya Ukiukaji wa Hakimiliki

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: Je, najua cha kufanya mazoezi baadaye?

entries.source: Do not accept a revised paragraph until you can explain why the revision is better.
entries.value: Usikubali aya iliyorekebishwa mpaka uweze kueleza kwa nini marekebisho hayo ni bora.

entries.source: Do not act like a passive Q&A tutor or bury work in chat. Do not overpraise weak output. Keep the user as decision owner, preserve their voice in writing tasks, and end sessions with a concrete artifact or next action.
entries.value: Usitende kama mkufunzi wa maswali na majibu asiyehusisha au kuficha kazi ndani ya gumzo. Usisifie kupita kiasi kazi dhaifu. Mwache mtumiaji awe mmiliki wa maamuzi, hifadhi sauti yake katika kazi za uandishi, na malizia vipindi kwa kazi thabiti au hatua inayofuata.

entries.source: Do not advance just because the learner clicked next. Require evidence, name misconceptions specifically, and repair weak links before moving on.
entries.value: Usiendelee tu kwa sababu mwanafunzi amebofya inayofuata. Dai ushahidi, taja dhana potofu kwa usahihi, na rekebisha viungo dhaifu kabla ya kuendelea.

entries.source: Do not amplify hateful or dangerous arguments. Reframe sensitive topics around evidence, ethics, and learning.
entries.value: Usikuze hoja za chuki au hatari. Weka upya mada nyeti kuzunguka ushahidi, maadili, na kujifunza.

entries.source: Do not ask for a complete summary before you know the prerequisite ideas.
entries.value: Usiombe muhtasari kamili kabla hujajua mawazo ya msingi yanayotangulia.

entries.source: Do not ask learners to run unsafe code. Explain security-sensitive code at a high level when needed.
entries.value: Usiwaombe wanafunzi kuendesha msimbo usio salama. Eleza msimbo unaohusu usalama kwa kiwango cha juu inapohitajika.

entries.source: Do not ask which product wins. Ask which learning behavior fits.
entries.value: Usiulize bidhaa ipi inashinda. Uliza tabia gani ya kujifunza inafaa.

entries.source: Do not claim live verification without tools. Recommend checking primary sources for current facts.
entries.value: Usidai uthibitishaji wa moja kwa moja bila zana. Pendekeza kuangalia vyanzo vya msingi kwa taarifa za sasa.

entries.source: Do not complete graded work for the learner. Make them own the final response.
entries.value: Usikamilishe kazi yenye alama kwa niaba ya mwanafunzi. Mfanye amiliki jibu la mwisho.

entries.source: Do not confuse a fast answer with mastery.
entries.value: Usichanganye jibu la haraka na umahiri.

entries.source: Do not debate only the side you already agree with.
entries.value: Usijadili tu upande ambao tayari unakubaliana nao.

entries.source: Do not ignore hesitation; uncertainty is a useful signal for review.
entries.value: Usipuuze kusita; kutokuwa na uhakika ni ishara muhimu ya kurudia.

entries.source: Do not invent bibliographic details. Mark unknown fields clearly.
entries.value: Usibuni maelezo ya bibliografia. Weka wazi sehemu zisizojulikana.

entries.source: Do not invent citations. Clearly mark when source verification is needed.
entries.value: Usibuni marejeleo. Onyesha wazi wakati uthibitishaji wa chanzo unahitajika.

entries.source: Do not lecture by default, ask multiple questions, hide progress, or dump the answer too soon. Use hint ladders before explanations. If the learner asks for direct explanation, give it concisely and then require a final synthesis in their own words. For medical, legal, financial, or sensitive decisions, include appropriate caution and avoid pushing a hidden conclusion.
entries.value: Usitoe mhadhara kwa chaguo-msingi, usiulize maswali mengi, usifiche maendeleo, wala kumwaga jibu mapema mno. Tumia ngazi za vidokezo kabla ya maelezo. Ikiwa mwanafunzi anaomba maelezo ya moja kwa moja, yatoe kwa ufupi kisha dai muhtasari wa mwisho kwa maneno yake mwenyewe. Kwa maamuzi ya kitabibu, kisheria, kifedha, au nyeti, jumuisha tahadhari inayofaa na epuka kusukuma hitimisho lililofichwa.

entries.source: Do not let roleplay replace dates, context, documents, or evidence labels.
entries.value: Usiruhusu uigizaji kuchukua nafasi ya tarehe, muktadha, nyaraka, au lebo za ushahidi.

entries.source: Do not make a plan that assumes every topic needs equal time.
entries.value: Usitengeneze mpango unaodhani kila mada inahitaji muda sawa.

entries.source: Do not make flashcards from sentences you still cannot explain in your own words.
entries.value: Usitengeneze flashcards kutoka sentensi ambazo bado huwezi kueleza kwa maneno yako mwenyewe.

entries.source: Do not paste an assignment and ask for the finished response.
entries.value: Usibandike kazi na kuomba jibu lililokamilika.

entries.source: Do not provide long copyrighted text. Work from user-provided excerpts or brief summaries.
entries.value: Usitoe maandishi marefu yenye hakimiliki. Fanya kazi kutoka dondoo alizotoa mtumiaji au muhtasari mfupi.

entries.source: Do not provide therapy or crisis counseling. Encourage trusted human support for serious distress.
entries.value: Usitoe tiba au ushauri wa shida ya dharura. Himiza msaada wa binadamu anayeaminika kwa dhiki kubwa.

entries.source: Do not reproduce long copyrighted passages. Summarize user-provided text.
entries.value: Usizalishe tena vifungu virefu vyenye hakimiliki. Fupisha maandishi yaliyotolewa na mtumiaji.

entries.source: Do not reread notes before testing what you can already recall.
entries.value: Usisome tena madokezo kabla ya kupima unachoweza kukumbuka tayari.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: Usipitie kila kitu kwa uzito sawa

entries.source: Do not shame mistakes. For graded work, coach understanding rather than producing a submission.
entries.value: Usiaibishe makosa. Kwa kazi zenye alama, fundisha uelewa badala ya kutengeneza kazi ya kuwasilisha.

entries.source: Do not skip showing what you already tried; the useful help depends on that context.
entries.value: Usiruke kuonyesha ulichojaribu tayari; msaada unaofaa unategemea muktadha huo.

entries.source: Do not stop after the first explanation; make yourself answer questions about it.
entries.value: Usiishie kwenye maelezo ya kwanza; jilazimishe kujibu maswali kuhusu maelezo hayo.

entries.source: Do not treat generated dialogue as a real quote or primary source.
entries.value: Usichukulie mazungumzo yaliyotengenezwa kama nukuu halisi au chanzo cha msingi.

entries.source: Do something with it
entries.value: Fanya jambo nayo

entries.source: Do the comparison pages include private user chats?
entries.value: Je, kurasa za ulinganisho zinajumuisha gumzo binafsi za watumiaji?

entries.source: Do these guides connect to live AI learning tools?
entries.value: Je, miongozo hii inaunganishwa na zana za moja kwa moja za kujifunza kwa AI?

entries.source: Do we have free will?
entries.value: Je, tuna uhuru wa kuchagua?

entries.source: Do you have a next route open: a mode, subject hub, workflow, or related guide?
entries.value: Je, una njia inayofuata iliyo wazi: hali, kituo cha somo, mtiririko wa kazi, au mwongozo unaohusiana?

entries.source: Do you know which route to use next: a mode, prompt, subject hub, or related guide?
entries.value: Je, unajua njia ya kutumia baadaye: hali, kidokezo, kituo cha somo, au mwongozo unaohusiana?

entries.source: Does inspir expose private homework chats to Google?
entries.value: Je, inspir inafichua gumzo binafsi za kazi za nyumbani kwa Google?

entries.source: Does inspir publish a child's private chats?
entries.value: Je, inspir inachapisha gumzo binafsi za mtoto?

entries.source: Does inspir support schools?
entries.value: Je, inspir inasaidia shule?

entries.source: Does this comparison include private user chats?
entries.value: Je, ulinganisho huu unajumuisha gumzo binafsi za watumiaji?

entries.source: Draft cards, test the learner, refine weak cards, and suggest review spacing.
entries.value: Andaa kadi, mjaribu mwanafunzi, boresha kadi dhaifu, na pendekeza nafasi za marudio.

entries.source: Draw a supply-demand graph
entries.value: Chora grafu ya mahitaji na usambazaji

entries.source: Draw/Sketch Board
entries.value: Ubao wa Kuchora/Michoro

entries.source: due date
entries.value: tarehe ya kukabidhi

entries.source: Each article is written to help learners, parents, educators, and builders use AI for understanding, practice, and confidence.
entries.value: Kila makala imeandikwa kusaidia wanafunzi, wazazi, waelimishaji, na wajenzi kutumia AI kwa uelewa, mazoezi, na kujiamini.

entries.source: Each audience path connects to public, crawlable learning surfaces.
entries.value: Kila njia ya hadhira huunganishwa na nyuso za kujifunza za umma zinazoweza kutambazwa.

entries.source: Each category has its own search intent, live mode links, and guide structure so the library is useful to people and legible to search systems.
entries.value: Kila kategoria ina nia yake ya utafutaji, viungo vya hali za moja kwa moja, na muundo wa mwongozo ili maktaba iwe na manufaa kwa watu na ieleweke kwa mifumo ya utafutaji.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Kila ulinganisho umeandikwa uwe wa haki, wenye manufaa, na unaoelekeza hatua: zana inayojulikana ni nzuri kwa nini, inspir inatofautiana wapi, na ni hali gani ya umma ya kufungua kwanza.

entries.source: Each guide ends with practice plans, routes, and links into the exact learning mode that fits.
entries.value: Kila mwongozo huishia kwa mipango ya mazoezi, njia, na viungo vinavyoingia kwenye hali sahihi ya kujifunza inayofaa.

entries.source: Each hub is a crawlable subject guide, but it also sends learners straight into live guest-mode learning instead of stranding them on a brochure page.
entries.value: Kila kituo ni mwongozo wa somo unaoweza kutambazwa, lakini pia huwapeleka wanafunzi moja kwa moja kwenye kujifunza kwa hali ya mgeni badala ya kuwaacha kwenye ukurasa wa matangazo.

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public URL so learners can arrive from search directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: Kila hali ya kujifunza ina URL ya umma ili wanafunzi waweze kufika kutoka utafutaji moja kwa moja ndani ya uzoefu sahihi wa kujifunza.

entries.source: Each map card connects a real learner need to live modes, prompt starters, deeper guides, and a review loop. People can use it. Crawlers can understand it.
entries.value: Kila kadi ya ramani huunganisha hitaji halisi la mwanafunzi na hali za moja kwa moja, vidokezo vya kuanzia, miongozo ya kina, na mzunguko wa marudio. Watu wanaweza kuitumia. Vitambazaji vinaweza kuielewa.

entries.source: Each mode opens as a public guest chat with its own purpose, examples, and learning flow, so learners can start with the right kind of support immediately.
entries.value: Kila hali hufunguka kama gumzo la mgeni la umma lenye kusudi lake, mifano, na mtiririko wa kujifunza, ili wanafunzi waanze mara moja na aina sahihi ya msaada.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Kila ukurasa huunganisha nia ya ulinganisho na hali za moja kwa moja, miongozo, vidokezo, na faili za ugunduzi zinazosomeka na AI.

entries.source: Each path connects the right public guest modes, prompts, and guides so learners can move from a search intent into a real practice loop.
entries.value: Kila njia huunganisha hali sahihi za umma za mgeni, vidokezo, na miongozo ili wanafunzi wahame kutoka nia ya utafutaji kwenda mzunguko halisi wa mazoezi.

entries.source: Each phrase maps to the same practical workflow: choose a public mode, ask for active help, then review what changed.
entries.value: Kila kirai hujielekeza kwenye mtiririko uleule wa vitendo: chagua hali ya umma, omba msaada hai, kisha rudia kilichobadilika.

entries.source: Each prompt opens the matching public mode, so a learner can move from search result to a focused study session quickly.
entries.value: Kila kidokezo hufungua hali ya umma inayolingana, ili mwanafunzi ahame haraka kutoka matokeo ya utafutaji kwenda kipindi kilicholenga cha kusoma.

entries.source: Each public mode has a different learning behavior, so every guide gives learners and search systems a clear explanation of when to use that mode, what to ask, and how to keep learning active.
entries.value: Kila hali ya umma ina tabia tofauti ya kujifunza, kwa hiyo kila mwongozo huwapa wanafunzi na mifumo ya utafutaji maelezo wazi ya wakati wa kutumia hali hiyo, cha kuuliza, na jinsi ya kuweka kujifunza kuwa hai.

entries.source: Each route ends with explain-back, a quiz, a flashcard, a source check, or a study plan.
entries.value: Kila njia huishia kwa kueleza kwa maneno yako, jaribio, flashcard, ukaguzi wa chanzo, au mpango wa kusoma.

entries.source: Each step opens a live guest mode, so this is not a static guide. It is a route into practice, feedback, and review.

entries.source: Economics Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Play with markets, scarcity, incentives, policy, and personal finance through simple simulations.

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Work through dilemmas by weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Ethics Dilemmas ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: shughulikia mitanziko kwa kupima wadau, matokeo, wajibu, haki, na mambo ya kubadilishana.

entries.source: Evaluate a public AI learning layer first, then explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, content alignment, and usage funding.
entries.value: Tathmini kwanza tabaka la umma la kujifunza kwa AI, kisha chunguza mitiririko maalum, mahitaji ya usiri, ulinganishaji wa maudhui, na ufadhili wa matumizi.

entries.source: Evaluate articles, claims, videos, or posts for evidence, bias, reliability, and missing context.
entries.value: Tathmini makala, madai, video, au machapisho kwa ajili ya ushahidi, upendeleo, uaminifu, na muktadha unaokosekana.

entries.source: Evaluate evidence, author, motive, corroboration, and missing perspectives.
entries.value: Tathmini ushahidi, mwandishi, nia, uthibitisho kutoka vyanzo vingine, na mitazamo inayokosekana.

entries.source: Every article connects to categories, live modes, subject hubs, learning paths, and related guides.

entries.source: Every core learning mode has a public guest entrypoint so people can start from search, social, or a shared link.
entries.value: Kila hali kuu ya kujifunza ina njia ya umma ya kuingia kama mgeni ili watu waanze kutoka utafutaji, mitandao ya kijamii, au kiungo kilichoshirikiwa.

entries.source: Every guide, path, subject hub, and prompt route is connected so learners and AI systems can understand the map.
entries.value: Kila mwongozo, njia, kituo cha somo, na njia ya prompt imeunganishwa ili wanafunzi na mifumo ya AI waweze kuelewa ramani.

entries.source: Every indexable guest learning chat, organized by teaching behavior and learning need.
entries.value: Kila gumzo la kujifunza la mgeni linaloweza kuorodheshwa, limepangwa kwa tabia ya kufundisha na hitaji la kujifunza.

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Kila kiungo hapa ni cha umma na kinaweza kutambazwa. Gumzo binafsi za watumiaji hubaki nje ya ulinganisho, sitemap, na faili za ugunduzi zinazosomeka na AI.

entries.source: Every non-app page now has a job: build trust, explain the learning route, and send learners toward a useful next action without hiding the important details.
entries.value: Kila ukurasa usio wa app sasa una kazi: kujenga uaminifu, kueleza njia ya kujifunza, na kuwaelekeza wanafunzi kwenye hatua inayofuata yenye manufaa bila kuficha maelezo muhimu.

entries.source: Every public inspir mode has its own guest URL, examples, and teaching behavior, so learners can arrive directly from search and begin in the right flow.
entries.value: Kila hali ya umma ya inspir ina URL yake ya mgeni, mifano, na tabia ya kufundisha, ili wanafunzi wafike moja kwa moja kutoka utafutaji na waanze katika mtiririko sahihi.

entries.source: Every public learning mode has guides and prompt loops.
entries.value: Kila hali ya umma ya kujifunza ina miongozo na mizunguko ya vidokezo.

entries.source: Every public mode is a doorway into a different learning behavior, so the format can match the job instead of forcing every learner into one generic chat box.
entries.value: Kila hali ya umma ni mlango wa tabia tofauti ya kujifunza, ili muundo ulingane na kazi badala ya kumlazimisha kila mwanafunzi kwenye kisanduku kimoja cha gumzo la jumla.

entries.source: Every subject page connects content to action.
entries.value: Kila ukurasa wa somo huunganisha maudhui na hatua.

entries.source: Every workflow below is hand-linked to public pages: a path when one exists, the best live modes, prompt starters, related guides, and a review rhythm.

entries.source: EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY LAW, YOU WILL HOLD US AND OUR OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS HARMLESS FOR ANY INDIRECT, PUNITIVE, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGE, HOWEVER IT ARISES (INCLUDING ATTORNEYS’ FEES AND ALL RELATED COSTS AND EXPENSES OF LITIGATION AND ARBITRATION, OR AT TRIAL OR ON APPEAL, IF ANY, WHETHER OR NOT LITIGATION OR ARBITRATION IS INSTITUTED), WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, NEGLIGENCE, OR OTHER TORTIOUS ACTION, OR ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THIS AGREEMENT, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION ANY CLAIM FOR PERSONAL INJURY OR PROPERTY DAMAGE, ARISING FROM THIS AGREEMENT AND ANY VIOLATION BY YOU OF ANY FEDERAL, STATE, OR LOCAL LAWS, STATUTES, RULES, OR REGULATIONS, EVEN IF COMPANY HAS BEEN PREVIOUSLY ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGE. EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY LAW, IF THERE IS LIABILITY FOUND ON THE PART OF COMPANY, IT WILL BE LIMITED TO THE AMOUNT PAID FOR THE PRODUCTS AND/OR SERVICES, AND UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES WILL THERE BE CONSEQUENTIAL OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. SOME STATES DO NOT ALLOW THE EXCLUSION OR LIMITATION OF PUNITIVE, INCIDENTAL OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, SO THE PRIOR LIMITATION OR EXCLUSION MAY NOT APPLY TO YOU.
entries.value: ISIPOKUWA KAMA INAKATAZWA NA SHERIA, UTAWAWEKA SISI NA MAAFISA WETU, WAKURUGENZI, WAFANYAKAZI, NA MAWAKALA WETU BILA MADAI KWA UHARIBIFU WOWOTE USIO WA MOJA KWA MOJA, WA ADHABU, MAALUM, WA BAHATI MBAYA, AU WA MATOKEO, KWA NAMNA YOYOTE UNAVYOTOKEA (IKIWA NI PAMOJA NA ADA ZA MAWAKILI NA GHARAMA ZOTE ZINAZOHUSIANA NA SHAURI NA USULUHISHI, AU KATIKA KESI AU RUFAA, IKIWA ZIPO, IWE SHAURI AU USULUHISHI UMEANZISHWA AU HAUJAANZISHWA), IWE KATIKA HATUA YA MKATABA, UZEMBE, AU KOSA LINGINE LA MADAI, AU UKITOKANA NA AU KUHUSIANA NA MAKUBALIANO HAYA, IKIJUMUISHA BILA KIKOMO DAI LOLOTE LA JERAHA BINAFSI AU UHARIBIFU WA MALI, LINALOTOKANA NA MAKUBALIANO HAYA NA UKIUKAJI WOWOTE WAKO WA SHERIA, KANUNI, TARATIBU, AU MASHARTI YA SHIRIKISHO, JIMBO, AU ENEO, HATA KAMA COMPANY ILIARIFIWA AWALI KUHUSU UWEZEKANO WA UHARIBIFU HUO. ISIPOKUWA KAMA INAKATAZWA NA SHERIA, IKIWA DHIMA ITAPATIKANA KWA UPANDE WA COMPANY, ITAPUNGUKIA KIASI KILICHOLIPWA KWA BIDHAA NA/AU HUDUMA, NA KATIKA HALI YOYOTE HAKUTAKUWA NA UHARIBIFU WA MATOKEO AU WA ADHABU. BAADHI YA MAJIMBO HAYARUHUSU KUONDOLEWA AU KUWEKWA KIKOMO KWA UHARIBIFU WA ADHABU, WA BAHATI MBAYA AU WA MATOKEO, HIVYO KIKOMO AU KUONDOLEWA KULIKOTANGULIA HUENDA KUSIKUHUSU.

entries.source: Explain My Answer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Explain My Answer ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: bandika swali, jibu lako, na jibu linalotarajiwa ikiwa unalo. Msaidizi wako anaeleza mantiki na kukusaidia kuepuka kosa lilelile wakati ujao.
